description.en: Returns the developer-defined identifier for thisPeriodicSyncEvent. Multiple tags can be used by the web app to run different periodic tasks at different frequencies.

excerpt.es: Returns the developer-defined identifier for thisPeriodicSyncEvent. Multiple tags can be used by the web app to run different periodic tasks at different frequencies.
